skill_id.description: Stable unique identifier; never repurpose for a different skill.

topic.description: Course topic (UI topic, generator branch, or science topic key).

subtopic.description: Finer grain: Hebrew subtopic id, math kind, science draft leaf, etc.

description.description: Human-readable scope; may cite source file or generator kind.

source.description: Optional provenance: file path, map name, or audit artifact.

spine_layer.description: Optional spine layer discriminator (e.g. content_map vs rich_bank).

linked_skill_ids.description: Optional links to other spine skill_ids (e.g. Hebrew rich-bank → content-map rows).
